overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit downtown district. The clip begins with a dramatic upward view of towering buildings and holographic advertisements before tilting down to street level where the character navigates through pedestrians and vehicles in a dense cyberpunk urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical canyon between towering cyberpunk buildings with elevated walkways and neon signage

events.description: camera begins slow tilt downward from vertical skyward angle
bright sun glare appears as camera tilts toward the light source between buildings

agents.ego_description: stationary character looking up at the towering architecture and holographic advertisements, then beginning to tilt view downward toward street level

entered.detail: large red neon sign shaped like lips mounted on the left building facade
red metal truss structure forming an elevated walkway between buildings
large holographic billboard displaying a woman's face with blue hair
tall glass and steel building facade with multiple illuminated windows
enclosed pedestrian bridge connecting buildings above street level

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a dramatic upward view of a cyberpunk city canyon, showcasing towering buildings covered in neon signage and holographic advertisements. The camera slowly tilts down from the sky, revealing the intricate metal trusswork of elevated walkways and the glass facades of skyscrapers. Bright sunlight creates lens flare effects as the view descends toward street level, with no pedestrians or vehicles visible yet in this vertical architectural space.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated transit infrastructure with neon commercial signage

events.description: camera completes tilt and reveals street level with pedestrians and vehicles
character begins walking forward along the sidewalk under the elevated structure
futuristic black vehicle drives past on the street to the left

agents.ego_description: following a character wearing a white jacket and shorts walking along the sidewalk beneath elevated walkways

notable_agents.action: character in white jacket and shorts walking steadily ahead of the camera
pedestrian in blue top and dark pants walking past the camera in the opposite direction

entered.detail: red rectangular street sign with white text reading 'Sagan Ave' mounted on a pole
yellow and black escalator structure leading up to elevated walkway
commercial storefronts with illuminated signs at ground level

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches street level and begins following a character walking along a sidewalk beneath massive elevated structures. The environment features the 'Sagan Ave' street sign, a yellow escalator on the right, and various pedestrians walking in the same direction. Futuristic vehicles drive past on the adjacent road, and the metal truss bridge now looms overhead as the character moves forward under the covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with yellow-striped crosswalks and multi-level infrastructure

events.description: character turns left toward the crosswalk to cross the street
moving from covered sidewalk to open intersection with wider visibility
character steps onto the yellow-striped crosswalk to cross the intersection

agents.ego_description: character walks toward and begins crossing the street intersection, navigating around other pedestrians and observing traffic

notable_agents.action: black futuristic sedan driving through the intersection from left to right
pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead into the crosswalk

entered.detail: wide street crossing with yellow parallel stripes and red border markings
corner of red building with large digital displays showing advertisements
traffic lights suspended over the intersection showing green

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a wide urban intersection, turning left to cross the street. The environment opens up to reveal a large crosswalk with yellow stripes, a red building corner with digital billboards on the left, and overhead traffic signals. The character steps onto the crosswalk as vehicles pass through the intersection, moving from the covered sidewalk into a more open plaza-like space with scattered pedestrians.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from a towering architectural canyon into the bustling activity of a neon-lit downtown district. It begins with a dramatic upward view of skyscrapers and holographic advertisements, slowly tilting down past intricate metal trusswork and glass facades as bright sunlight creates lens flares. As the camera reaches street level, the perspective shifts to follow a character walking along a sidewalk beneath massive elevated structures, passing a Sagan Ave sign and a yellow escalator amidst a flow of pedestrians and futuristic vehicles. The scene then opens up as the character turns left to cross a wide urban intersection, moving from the covered walkway onto a yellow-striped crosswalk. Finally, the view expands into a plaza-like space featuring red building corners and digital billboards as the character navigates through the open intersection.
